title: YeastExM: Expansion Microscopy on Saccharomyces cerevisiae
author: Korovesi, Artemis G.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Here we provide a video protocol showing how to proceed throughout the protocol of ExM on Yeast as described here: 

  "Expansion microscopy on Saccharomyces cerevisiae"   

 (DOI:   10.20944/preprints202203.0146.v1) 

 Artemis G. Korovesi §1 , Leonor Morgado §1 , Marco Fumasoni 1 , Ricardo Henriques 1,2 , Hannah S. Heil 1* , Mario Del Rosario 1*  

 Correspondance to H.S.H.:  hsheil@igc.gulbenkian.pt  & M.D.R.:  mrosario@igc.gulbenkian.pt
steps_raw:
Here we provide a video protocol showing how to proceed throughout the protocol of ExM on Yeast as described here:

keywords: Expansion microscopy, Video protocol, Saccharomyces cerevisiae
